Two Distinct Sanctuaries

Choose your Grey Estate experience

Grey Estate offers three ways to experience the same magical hillside in Katouna: Villa Onerio (sleeps 7), Villa Petra (sleeps 2), or the entire Grey Estate together for up to 9 guests (8 adults). Each with those extraordinary Ionian views.

Sleeps 7 Guests
Grey Estate — Villa Onerio
Villa Onerio

A contemporary stone masterpiece set into the Katouna hillside — with a large infinity pool, sweeping panoramic terraces, multiple sea-view suites, and uninterrupted views stretching from the Ionian to the mountains of mainland Greece.

Infinity Pool 4 Suites Sea View Terraces Pergola Lounge Glass Balustrades
Check Availability →
Sleeps 2 Guests
Grey Estate — Villa Petra
Villa Petra

An intimate stone retreat tucked into ancient olive groves, with its own private plunge pool and terrace. Rustic character meets modern interiors in this romantic hideaway — peaceful, private, and utterly authentic.

Plunge Pool 2 Bedrooms Private Terrace Stone Architecture Olive Grove Setting
Check Availability →
Up to 9 Guests
Grey Estate — Exclusive Buyout
The Full Estate

Book both Villa Onerio and Villa Petra together for an exclusive full-estate experience. Ideal for large families, group getaways or milestone celebrations — the entire hillside retreat is yours, with two private pools, all terraces, and up to 9 guests (8 adults).

Up to 9 Guests Two Private Pools Full Estate Privacy Villa Onerio + Petra Exclusive Buyout

The Katouna Hillside Experience

A retreat that honours
every detail

Perched above Nydri bay, Grey Villa is a sanctuary of considered luxury — where hand-selected materials, bespoke linens, and unobstructed panoramas over olive groves and the Ionian Sea define every moment. Lefkada town and the island's legendary beaches are mere minutes away.

✦
  • 🛏
    Luxury Sea-View Suites Floor-to-ceiling sliding glass opens directly onto private terraces — wake up to the Ionian framed like a painting
  • 🌅
    Panoramic Glass Terraces 360° views across olive groves, Nydri bay, the Ionian islands, and the mountains of mainland Greece at sunset
  • 🫒
    Authentic Lefkadian Setting The village of Katouna surrounds you — ancient stone walls, centuries-old olive trees, genuine island life
  • 🏊
    Private Pool & Outdoor Living Infinity pool, pergola lounge, and terrace dining — designed for long Ionian afternoons
  • 🚗
    Perfectly Positioned 5 minutes to Lefkada town, 15–35 minutes to the world's most beautiful beaches

Exclusive Guest Services

Curated for those who
expect the extraordinary

Every service is arranged personally for you — no impersonal concierge desks. Just your own Lefkadian story, crafted with care.

01
Private Chef & Culinary Journeys
Dine under Ionian stars with a private chef preparing Greek and Mediterranean feasts using morning-fresh local produce, Lefkadian olive oil, and island wines.
🍽 🫒 🍷
02
Boat Trips, Yachts & Island Cruises
Discover hidden sea caves and secluded bays aboard a private yacht or caïque — with an expert skipper who knows every secret of the Ionian archipelago.
⛵ 🏝 🌊
03
Personalised Island Tours
From Englouvi's traditional villages to the emerald waterfalls of Nydri — your private guide unveils the real Lefkada, far beyond the tourist trail.
🗺 🏔 🌿
04
In-Villa Massage & Wellness
Deep-tissue, hot stone, or traditional Greek massage performed on your terrace as the sun sets over the Ionian Sea.
💆 🌸 ✨
05
Sunrise Yoga & Private Fitness
Begin your morning with yoga on the terrace as golden light spills over the hills, or train with a personal fitness coach at your own pace.
🧘 🌄 💪
06
Bespoke Concierge Services
Airport transfers, restaurant reservations, grocery pre-stocking, floral arrangements — every detail handled before you arrive.
🌺 🚗 🥂
Your Island, Explored

Discover Lefkada
The Ionian gem

Consistently ranked among Europe's most beautiful islands, Lefkada bridges the wild and the refined — sheer white cliffs above impossible turquoise, shaded tavernas where wine and time move slowly. Grey Estate is your perfect base.

📸 Add your Porto Katsiki photo here
Porto Katsiki · Lefkada
I

Porto Katsiki

One of the most iconic beaches in all of Greece — towering white limestone cliffs plunge hundreds of metres into electric turquoise water of supernatural clarity. A curved pebble bay framed by dramatic rock faces, photographed from above and below. The staircase descent makes it all the more rewarding.

35 min from Grey Estate ⭐ Best beach in Lefkada
📸 Add your Egremni photo here
Egremni · West Coast
II

Egremni

Wild, remote, and achingly beautiful — Egremni stretches 2.5 km of Caribbean-blue water beneath limestone cliffs. Today reachable only by boat from Nydri or Vasiliki, which makes the arrival by sea even more dramatic. One of the bluest beaches on earth, with barely any facilities — bring everything you need and stay all day.

30 min from Grey Estate 🚤 Accessible by boat
📸 Add your Nydri / sailing photo here
Nydri · Sailing & Islands
III

Nydri & Island Hopping

Set sail from Nydri's lively harbour to Meganisi, Scorpios, Kalamos, or across the Ionian to Kefalonia and Ithaka. Daily excursion boats and private yacht charters make island hopping effortless. The Ionian archipelago unfolds like a secret map — every bay more beautiful than the last.

20 min from Grey Estate ⛵ Private yacht available
📸 Add your Lefkada Town photo here
Lefkada Town · 10 min away
IV

Lefkada Town & Tavernas

A rare working Greek island town that hasn't forgotten itself. Stroll along the colourful neoclassical houses, discover the Venetian lighthouse at Cape Doukato, browse the Saturday market, and settle into a seafront kafeneion with an ouzo and a view of the lagoon. Real taverna life — warm, unhurried, and entirely Greek.

10 min from Grey Estate 🏛 Venetian heritage
📸 Add your water sports photo here
Vasiliki · World-class Windsurfing
V

Water Sports & Adventure

Vasiliki Bay is a world-famous mecca for windsurfing and kitesurfing — the afternoon thermal winds arrive like clockwork every summer day. Beyond the sails: paddleboarding in crystal coves, open-water diving, sea kayaking, and guided hiking trails through the island's wild interior. The Ionian invites you to explore it every way possible.

Island-wide 🏄 World-class windsurfing
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
"

Waking up at Grey Villa — with nothing between you and the Ionian but olive trees, silence, and that impossible blue — is something that stays long after you have returned home.

✦

Elena & Marco · Milano · July
